instruction: Please duplicate the last two slides and insert the copies in alternating order, so the sequence becomes: original slide A, original slide B, then duplicated slide A, duplicated slide B.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited.pptx', 'dest': 'MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/9ec204e4-f0a3-42f8-8458-b772a6797cab/MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited_Gold.pptx', 'dest': 'MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited_Gold.pptx'})) or compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited.pptx', 'dest': 'MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/9ec204e4-f0a3-42f8-8458-b772a6797cab/MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited_Gold_all_fonts.pptx', 'dest': 'MLA_Workshop_061X_Works_Cited_Gold_all_fonts.pptx'}))
